scripts.test:python: npm run version:check && python tests/test_client_form.py && python tests/test_html_syntax.py && python tests/test_integrity.py && python tests/test_personalization_core.py && python -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_handoff.py tests/test_project_import.py tests/test_project_knowledge.py && python tests/test_windows_runtime.py && python tests/test_runtime_source.py
scripts.test:release: npm run test:python && npm run test:browser && npm run test:package && python tests/run_10x_stress.py && python tests/test_release_runtime_flow.py
